ddt:Target.Name: SIECU2 V1.4
ddt:Target.Description:
Supplier : HELLA ECU name : SIECU
EDL : Jérôme VERDON DEA-SBM3 ---------- History 1.0 Creation
1.1 Update of ECU Adress and creation of the screen (inprogress)
1.2 Update of service $30D6 (minimum value 4C instead of 33) Update of screen "reading parameter"
1.3 Modification of answer for service $30D601 (Bug in Plant)
1.4 Modification of parameters : HardwareNumber.BasicPartList PartNumber.BasicPartList Add of HHA for application

Data.Name: Actuator output
Data.Comment: Actuator output

Data.Name: Actuator measured
Data.Comment: Actuator measured

Data.Name: Sensor angle
Data.Comment: Sensor Value

Data.Name: Light Signal
Data.Comment: Light Signal

Data.Name: Supply Voltage
Data.Comment: Supply Voltage

Data.Name: External 5V
Data.Comment: External 5V

Data.Name: External Sensor
Data.Comment: External Sensor

Data.Name: HELLA Part Number
Data.Comment: HELLA's Reference of the part

Data.Name: Vehicle Speed
Data.Comment: Vehicle speed

Data.Name: Initialization status
Data.Comment: Answer to know the status of initialization

Data.Name: Test Position
Data.Comment: Position for test the actuator

Data.Name: Y axis interception 1 Read
Data.Comment: Parameter used to calculate the flapping of the sensor

Data.Name: Y axis interception 2 Read
Data.Comment: Parameter used to calculate the flapping of the sensor

Data.Name: Y axis interception 3 Read
Data.Comment: Parameter used to calculate the flapping of the sensor

Data.Name: Y axis interception 4 Read
Data.Comment: Parameter used to calculate the flapping of the sensor

Data.Name: Y axis interception 1 Write
Data.Comment: Parameter used to calculate the flapping of the sensor

Data.Name: Y axis interception 2 Write
Data.Comment: Parameter used to calculate the flapping of the sensor

Data.Name: Y axis interception 3 Write
Data.Comment: Parameter used to calculate the flapping of the sensor

Data.Name: Y axis interception 4 Write
Data.Comment: Parameter used to calculate the flapping of the sensor

Data.Name: CalibrationNumber
Data.Comment: Calibration Number in Hexa

Data.Name: DiagnosticIdentificationCode
Data.Comment: Diag evolution number

Data.Name: SoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: Software identification number

Data.Name: Status IO COntrol
Data.Comment: Status of the IO control

Data.Name: Sensor Angle 1 Read
Data.Comment: 1st value of sensor angle for the calibration table

Data.Name: Sensor Angle 1 Write
Data.Comment: 1st value of sensor angle for the calibration table

Data.Name: Sensor Angle 2 Read
Data.Comment: 2nd value of sensor angle for the calibration table

Data.Name: Sensor Angle 3 Read
Data.Comment: 3rd value of sensor angle for the calibration table

Data.Name: Sensor Angle 4 Read
Data.Comment: 4th value of sensor angle for the calibration table

Data.Name: Sensor Angle 5 Read
Data.Comment: 5th value of sensor angle for the calibration table

Data.Comment: 6th value of sensor angle for the calibration table

Data.Name: Sensor Angle 7 Read
Data.Comment: 7th value of sensor angle for the calibration table

Data.Name: Sensor Angle 8 Read
Data.Comment: 8th value of sensor angle for the calibration table

Data.Name: Sensor Incl. factor 1 Read
Data.Comment: Factor used to calculate the flapping of the sensor

Data.Name: Sensor Incl. factor 2 Read
Data.Comment: Factor used to calculate the flapping of the sensor

Data.Name: Sensor Output 1 Read
Data.Comment: 1st value of sensor output for the calibration table

Data.Comment: 2nd value of sensor output for the calibration table

Data.Comment: 3rd value of sensor output for the calibration table

Data.Comment: 8th value of sensor output for the calibration table

Data.Comment: 2nd value of sensor angle for the calibration table

Data.Comment: 4th value of sensor angle for the calibration table

Data.Comment: 6th value of sensor angle for the calibration table

Data.Comment: 7th value of sensor angle for the calibration table

Data.Comment: 8th value of sensor angle for the calibration table

Data.Comment: Factor used to calculate the flapping of the sensor

Data.Comment: Factor used to calculate the flapping of the sensor

Data.Comment: 1st value of sensor output for the calibration table

Data.Comment: 8th value of sensor output for the calibration table

Data.Name: Sensor High Limit Read
Data.Comment: Maximum value angle visble by the sensor

Data.Name: Sensor Low Limit Read
Data.Comment: minimum angle value visible by the sensor

Data.Name: Sensor Low Limit Write
Data.Comment: minimum angle value visible by the sensor

Data.Name: Sensor High Limit Write
Data.Comment: Maximum value angle visble by the sensor

Data.Name: Sensor Position after system ajustment Read
Sensor Position after system ajustment Write
SupplierNumber.ITG
Data.Comment: Supplier ITG code

Data.Name: EditionNumber
Data.Comment: Software version(edition) number

Data.Name: Output Error Default Position Write
Data.Comment: Value of output sensor in case of error system

Data.Name: Output Error Default Position Read
Data.Comment: Value of output sensor in case of error system

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

DataItem.Name: Sensor Position after system ajustment Write
Sensor Position after system ajustment Read

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: Use this request if you want failure page erase failures.

Display.DataName: Sensor Position after system ajustment Read
